aboutPage.title: About Us - Divanco Architecture
aboutPage.metaDescription: DIVANCO S.A.S designs and builds exclusive spaces that combine bioclimatic innovation, technical excellence and personalized attention.
aboutPage.heroDescription: At DIVANCO S.A.S we design, create and build personalized residential and commercial spaces that integrate innovation, art and sustainability.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We design and build exclusive spaces that combine bioclimatic innovation, technical excellence and personalized attention, to transform our clients' ideas into unique and memorable habitable realities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: At DIVANCO S.A.S we design, create and build personalized residential and commercial spaces that integrate innovation, art and sustainability. We transform each client's vision into unique architectural experiences that reflect their essence, style and purpose. Our passion is to create works that inspire and elevate Colombian architecture to the world.

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.description: To inspire and materialize the essence of each person, company or territory through unique and memorable architectural spaces, combining art, innovation and technical excellence, driving Colombia's sustainable growth towards the world.

valueProposition.title: Value Proposition
valueProposition.subtitle: Architecture with Soul
valueProposition.mainStatement: DIVANCO offers comprehensive architectural solutions that fuse personalized design, innovation and constructive excellence, driven by the passion of a team that builds with soul, to create unique spaces that reflect the essence and dreams of each client, projecting the quality of Colombian talent to the world.

nature.title: Nature of Service
nature.description: DIVANCO is more than a design and construction company: it is a firm that converts ideas into habitable experiences, guided by the conviction that each project has a story, an emotion and an essence that deserve to be materialized with mastery.

design.title: High-Level Personalized Design
design.description: The client's vision and style are the starting point

construction.title: Impeccable Construction Execution
construction.description: Backed by rigorous technical processes and the highest quality materials

hardware.title: Premium Hardware Store
hardware.description: Space for inspiration, advice and connection where innovation becomes tangible experience

items.title: Passion for Detail
items.description: Each work is a creation made with the heart, caring for the aesthetic, functional and emotional

items.title: Deep Personalization
items.description: DIVANCO translates the client's essence into spaces that speak of their identity, history and purpose

items.title: Constant Innovation
items.description: We adopt global architectural trends and reinterpret them with Colombian signature

items.title: Technical and Human Excellence
items.description: Our team of experts builds with precision, commitment and soul

items.title: Customer Experience as Center
items.description: The relationship is close, transparent and empathetic from the first sketch to final delivery

items.title: Hardware Store as Connection Point
items.description: A place where quality is shown, felt and shared

functionalValue.title: Functional Value
items: Comprehensive design and construction processes that guarantee efficiency and compliance
Professional technical supervision at all stages of the project
Budget transparency and constant communication with the client
High durability finishes with international standards

emotionalValue.title: Emotional Value
emotionalValue.description: Building with soul: Each project is born from a genuine bond with the client; it is designed with sensitivity and built with passion. The client feels pride and belonging seeing their essence reflected in the created space. DIVANCO doesn't just deliver works: it delivers tangible emotions and habitable memories.

socialValue.title: Social and Symbolic Value
items: Elevates Colombian architecture to international stages, showing its creativity, quality and humanity
Promotes responsible and sustainable practices that respect the environment and strengthen the local economy
Generates dignified employment and promotes professional growth of technical and creative talent

positioning.title: Positioning
positioning.statement: At DIVANCO, each space is designed with purpose and built with soul: unique works that inspire, connect and transcend.
